rulings.Case Title: JACK N. THORNTON et al VS. SAMUEL R. HAUGH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Sever X-Complaint Of X-Deft Bashland Builders,Inc. And Jeffery Rexford Against Fred W. Pavlow,Inc., Dba Add-A-Garage
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, January 6, 2011, line 1, PLAINTIFFS JACK THORNTON AND PATRICIA THORNTON'S Motion To Sever Cross-Complaint Of Cross-Defendant Bashland Builders, Inc. And Jeffery Rexford Against Fred W. Pavlow, Inc., Dba Add-A-Garage. DENIED. ADD-A-GARAGE/PAVLOW IS AN INDISPENSABLE PARTY. IT WOULD NOT BE CONVENIENT FOR THE COURT OR THE PARTIES OR PERMIT GREATER EXPEDIENCY TO REQUIRE TWO SEPARATE TRIALS IN THIS MATTER. CCP SECTION 1048(b). =(302/CWW)
